content.content:
1→# Frontend Style Guide — Sem Parar (Zustand-only + Hook Component Pattern)
     2→
     3→Welcome to the **Sem Parar Frontend Style Guide**.  
     4→This version consolidates: **Zustand as the only state manager**, **Hook Component pattern** for Screens and Atomic components, **services architecture (SOLID)**, and an **cache pattern**.
     5→
     6→> Sit down, have a cup of coffee and read this calmly. ☕
     7→
     8→---
     9→
    10→## :pushpin: Table of Contents
    11→- [Introduction](#introduction)
    12→- [Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern](#components--screens--hook-component-pattern)
    13→- [Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern](#atomic-components--hook-component-pattern)
    14→- [Project Organization](#project-organization)
    15→- [Services Architecture](#services-architecture)
    16→- [State Management (Zustand-only)](#state-management-zustand-only)
    17→- [Routes Naming](#routes-naming)
    18→- [Folder Naming Rules](#folder-naming-rules)
    19→- [Code Standards](#code-standards)
    20→- [Styles Patterns](#styles-patterns)
    21→- [Cache Pattern](#cache-pattern)
    22→- [Checklist](#checklist)
    23→
    24→---
    25→
    26→## Introduction
    27→
    28→The goal of this guide is to ensure **consistency, testability and scalability** across our frontend projects.
    29→
    30→Key decisions:
    31→- **Zustand** is the **exclusive** global/shared state manager.
    32→- UI follows the **Hook Component** pattern (logic hook + dumb view).
    33→- Domain logic lives in **`/services`** with **SOLID** layering.
    34→- Cache is **typed and reusable**.
    35→
    36→---
    37→
    38→## Components & Screens — Hook Component Pattern
    39→
    40→Each screen is split into a logic hook and a render-only component.
    41→
    42→```
    43→screens/Home/
    44→├── index.ts        # logic: export useHomeScreen()
    45→├── view.tsx        # render: export default HomeScreen
    46→└── Models/
    47→    └── index.d.ts    # types (Props, State, Handlers, Return)
    48→```
    49→
    50→**Models/index.d.ts**
    51→```ts
    52→export interface HomeParams {
    53→  welcome?: string;
    54→}
    55→export interface HomeState {
    56→  greeting: string;
    57→  isLoading: boolean;
    58→}
    59→export interface HomeHandlers {
    60→  onPressCTA: () => void;
    61→}
    62→export type UseHomeReturn = HomeState & HomeHandlers;
    63→```
    64→
    65→**index.ts (logic hook)**
    66→```ts
    67→import { useCallback, useMemo, useState, useEffect } from "react";
    68→import type { HomeParams, UseHomeReturn } from "./Models";
    69→import { useUserStore } from "@/services/user/store"; // Zustand slice example
    70→
    71→export function useHomeScreen(params?: HomeParams): UseHomeReturn {
    72→  const name = useUserStore((s) => s.name);
    73→  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
    74→
    75→  useEffect(() => {
    76→    const t = setTimeout(() => setIsLoading(false), 300);
    77→    return () => clearTimeout(t);
    78→  }, []);
    79→
    80→  const greeting = useMemo(
    81→    () => params?.welcome ?? `Hello, ${name || "guest"}!`,
    82→    [params?.welcome, name]
    83→  );
    84→
    85→  const onPressCTA = useCallback(() => {
    86→    // Call services, analytics, navigation, etc.
    87→  }, []);
    88→
    89→  return { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA };
    90→}
    91→```
    92→
    93→**view.tsx (render)**
    94→```tsx
    95→import React from "react";
    96→import { View } from "react-native";
    97→import { Text, Button } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
    98→import { useHomeScreen } from "./index";
    99→import type { HomeParams } from "./Models";
   100→
   101→type Props = HomeParams;
   102→
   103→export default function HomeScreen(props: Props) {
   104→  const { greeting, isLoading, onPressCTA } = useHomeScreen(props);
   105→
   106→  if (isLoading) {
   107→    return (
   108→      <View>
   109→        <Text>Loading...</Text>
   110→      </View>
   111→    );
   112→  }
   113→
   114→  return (
   115→    <View>
   116→      <Text>{greeting}</Text>
   117→      <Button onPress={onPressCTA} text="Continue" />
   118→    </View>
   119→  );
   120→}
   121→```
   122→
   123→---
   124→
   125→## Atomic Components — Hook Component Pattern
   126→
   127→```
   128→atomic/atoms/Button/
   129→├── index.ts        # logic: export useButton()
   130→├── view.tsx        # render: export default Button
   131→└── Models/
   132→    └── index.d.ts
   133→```
   134→
   135→**Models/index.d.ts**
   136→```ts
   137→export interface ButtonProps {
   138→  text: string;
   139→  disabled?: boolean;
   140→  onPress?: () => void;
   141→}
   142→export interface ButtonState {
   143→  pressed: boolean;
   144→}
   145→export interface ButtonHandlers {
   146→  handlePress: () => void;
   147→}
   148→export type UseButtonReturn = ButtonState & ButtonHandlers;
   149→```
   150→
   151→**index.ts (logic hook)**
   152→```ts
   153→import { useCallback, useState } from "react";
   154→import type { ButtonProps, UseButtonReturn } from "./Models";
   155→
   156→export function useButton(props: ButtonProps): UseButtonReturn {
   157→  const [pressed, setPressed] = useState(false);
   158→
   159→  const handlePress = useCallback(() => {
   160→    setPressed(true);
   161→    props.onPress?.();
   162→    setTimeout(() => setPressed(false), 150);
   163→  }, [props.onPress]);
   164→
   165→  return { pressed, handlePress };
   166→}
   167→```
   168→
   169→**view.tsx (render)**
   170→```tsx
   171→import React from "react";
   172→import { Pressable, View } from "react-native";
   173→import { Text } from "@semparar/design-system-app";
   174→import { useButton } from "./index";
   175→import type { ButtonProps } from "./Models";
   176→
   177→export default function Button(props: ButtonProps) {
   178→  const { pressed, handlePress } = useButton(props);
   179→
   180→  return (
   181→    <Pressable disabled={props.disabled} onPress={handlePress}>
   182→      <View>
   183→        <Text>{props.text}{pressed ? " •" : ""}</Text>
   184→      </View>
   185→    </Pressable>
   186→  );
   187→}
   188→```
   189→
   190→---
   191→
   192→## Project Organization
   193→
   194→```
   195→src/
   196→├── @types/            # Global TS types
   197→├── assets/            # Images, fonts, icons
   198→├── atomic/            # UI components (Hook Component pattern)
   199→│   ├── atoms/
   200→│   ├── molecules/
   201→│   └── organisms/
   202→├── modules/           # Microfrontends shared and native modules
   203→├── screens/           # Page-level (Hook Component pattern)
   204→├── services/          # Domain logic (SOLID layout)
   205→│   ├── api/           # HTTP layer (Axios/Fetch)
   206→│   ├── class/         # Class with logical requests
   207→│   ├── hooks/         # Specific service hooks
   208→│   ├── repository/    # Data abstraction & mapping
   209→│   ├── services/      # Business orchestration
   210→│   ├── storage/       # Storage orchestration with cache or not
   211→│   ├── store/         # Zustand slices (only)
   212→│   ├── models/        # Domain types & contracts
   213→│   ├── utils/         # Reusable service helps
   214→│   └── index.ts       # Public exports
   215→├── hooks/             # Cross-cutting React hooks
   216→├── routes/            # Navigation config
   217→├── settings/          # Env & global config (axios, etc.)
   218→└── utils/             # General-purpose helpers
   219→```
   220→
   221→> UI **never** calls API directly. All effects & side effects live in the **logic hooks** (which call `/services`).
   222→
   223→---
   224→
   225→## Services Architecture
   226→
   227→**Flow:** `UI → services → repository → api` and `UI → services → store (Zustand)`
   228→
   229→- **api/**: request clients; no domain logic.
   230→- **class/**: class with logical requests.
   231→- **hooks/**: specific service hooks.
   232→- **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.
   233→- **services/**: orchestration and business rules.
   234→- **storage/**: storage orchestration with cache or not.
   235→- **store/**: Zustand slices (single source of app state).
   236→- **models/**: types, DTOs, contracts.
   237→- **utils/**: reusable service helpers.
   238→
   239→Principles:
   240→- Single responsibility per folder/file.
   241→- No circular dependencies.
   242→- Public APIs exported via `services/index.ts` per domain.
   243→
   244→---
   245→
   246→## State Management (Zustand-only)
   247→
   248→- All global/shared state is **Zustand**.
   249→- Slices live under `/services/<domain>/store/`.
   250→- Use `persist` (with `createJSONStorage`) only when needed.
   251→- Keep setters pure; side effects go in hooks or services.
   252→
   253→**Slice example**
   254→```ts
   255→import type { StateCreator } from "zustand";
   256→import type { AuthActions, AuthState } from "../models/store";
   257→
   258→export type AuthSlice = {
   259→    auth: AuthState;
   260→    authActions: AuthActions
   261→};
   262→
   263→const initialAuth = {
   264→    user: null,
   265→    loading: false,
   266→    error: undefined,
   267→}
   268→
   269→export const createAuthSlice: StateCreator<AuthSlice, [], [], AuthSlice> = (set) => ({
   270→    auth: initialAuth,
   271→    authActions: {
   272→        setLoading: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, isLoading: v } })),
   273→        setUser: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, user: v } })),
   274→        setError: (v) => set((s) => ({ auth: { ...s.auth, error: v } })),
   275→        reset: () => set({ auth: initialAuth }),
   276→    }
   277→});
   278→```
   279→
   280→**Root Store**
   281→
   282→- Applies to ALL Sem Parar frontend apps — including SuperApp.
   283→
   284→```ts
   285→import { create } from "zustand";
   286→import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from "zustand/middleware";
   287→import { immer } from "zustand/middleware/immer";
   288→
   289→import { createUserSlice, type UserSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-user/src/newArch/user";
   290→import { createAuthSlice, type AuthSlice } from "@semparar/mf-app-yourmf";
   291→
   292→import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   293→
   294→/** Add your slice Type */
   295→export type RootStore = UserSlice & AuthSlice;
   296→
   297→export const useRootStore = create<RootStore>()(
   298→  devtools(
   299→    persist(
   300→      immer((...a) => ({
   301→        ...createUserSlice(...a),
   302→        ...createAuthSlice(...a), // Add your slice here
   303→      })),
   304→      {
   305→        name: "root-storage",
   306→        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
   307→        partialize: (s) => ({
   308→          user: s.user,
   309→          auth: s.auth, // Add your store data
   310→        }),
   311→        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<RootStore>) }),
   312→      }
   313→    ),
   314→    { name: "RootStore" }
   315→  )
   316→);
   317→```
   318→
   319→- For Use on Class.
   320→
   321→```ts
   322→class Auth {
   323→  private readonly setAuth;
   324→
   325→  constructor () {
   326→    this.setUser = useRootStore.getState().authActions.setUser;
   327→  }
   328→
   329→  function doSomething(data) {
   330→    this.setUser({ ...data });
   331→  }
   332→}
   333→```
   334→
   335→- For Use on Component/Screen.
   336→- UI never imports the store directly — uses selectors
   337→
   338→```ts
   339→const loading = useRootStore((s) => s.user.isLoading);
   340→const token = useRootStore((s) => s.auth.token);
   341→```
   342→
   343→---
   344→
   345→## Routes Naming
   346→
   347→Standardize as **`Acronym + Route`**:
   348→- ✅ `SPPayment` (Sem Parar Payment)
   349→- ✅ `FTHPayment` (Fintech Payment)
   350→
   351→---
   352→
   353→## Folder Naming Rules
   354→
   355→| Folder                              | Convention   | Examples                    |
   356→|-------------------------------------|--------------|-----------------------------|
   357→| `atomic`, `screens`, `routes`       | `PascalCase` | `HomeScreen`, `CarDetails`  |
   358→| `assets`, `hooks`, `services`, etc. | `camelCase`  | `useAuth`, `authService`    |
   359→
   360→---
   361→
   362→## Code Standards
   363→
   364→**Language**: English only.  
   365→**Naming**: `camelCase` (vars/functions), `PascalCase` (components/classes), `UPPER_SNAKE_CASE` (constants).
   366→
   367→**Explanatory variables**
   368→```js
   369→const onlyNumbersRegex = /^\d+$/;
   370→const getNumberValidation = (message) => (value) => !onlyNumbersRegex.test(value) && message;
   371→const isNumber = getNumberValidation("error message");
   372→isNumber(1);
   373→```
   374→
   375→**Semantic constants**
   376→```js
   377→const DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS = 86400000;
   378→setTimeout(doSomething, DAY_IN_MILLISECONDS);
   379→```
   380→
   381→**Library workarounds with link**
   382→```js
   383→// Refer to issue https://github.com/ngokevin/react-file-reader-input/issues/11#issuecomment-363484861
   384→// eslint-disable-next-line no-param-reassign
   385→event.target.value = "";
   386→```
   387→
   388→**JSDoc**
   389→```js
   390→/**
   391→ * Truncates an event name to the max length.
   392→ * @param {*} eventName
   393→ * @param {*} maxLength
   394→ */
   395→```
   396→
   397→**Hooks: multi-line deps & IIFE**
   398→```ts
   399→useEffect(() => {
   400→  (async () => {
   401→    await CustomMath.randomSum();
   402→    setSum(42);
   403→  })();
   404→}, [
   405→  setSum,
   406→]);
   407→```
   408→
   409→**Extract conditions**
   410→```ts
   411→const hasSelectedOffer = !!(selectedProduct || selectedLeasingOffer);
   412→if (!hasSelectedOffer && !individualOffer) return;
   413→```
   414→
   415→**Optional chaining**
   416→```ts
   417→const answers = formikForm?.values?.answers;
   418→```
   419→
   420→**JSX indentation**
   421→```tsx
   422→{
   423→  !isEnd && (
   424→    <Button text="CTA" onPress={handleNavigate} />
   425→  )
   426→}
   427→```
   428→
   429→**Early returns**
   430→```ts
   431→if (!data) return null;
   432→return <View />;
   433→```
   434→
   435→**Nullish coalescing**
   436→```ts
   437→return data ?? 0;
   438→```
   439→---
   440→
   441→## Styles Patterns
   442→
   443→- Do **not** use `StyleSheet` or `styled-components`.
   444→- Use **@semparar/design-system-app** for components, tokens, and theming.
   445→
   446→---
   447→
   448→## Cache Pattern
   449→
   450→Keep cache typed, serializable, and domain.
   451→
   452→```ts
   453→import storage from "~/redux/store/storage";
   454→
   455→export interface CachedData<T> {
   456→  timestamp: number;
   457→  data: T;
   458→}
   459→
   460→export interface StorageContract<T> {
   461→  get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null>;
   462→  save(data: T): Promise<void>;
   463→  remove(): Promise<void>;
   464→}
   465→
   466→export class GenericStorage<T> implements StorageContract<T> {
   467→  constructor(private readonly key: string) {}
   468→
   469→  async get(): Promise<CachedData<T> | null> {
   470→    const json = await storage.getItem(this.key);
   471→    if (!json) return null;
   472→    return JSON.parse(json) as CachedData<T>;
   473→  }
   474→
   475→  async save(data: T): Promise<void> {
   476→    const payload: CachedData<T> = { timestamp: Date.now(), data };
   477→    await storage.setItem(this.key, JSON.stringify(payload));
   478→  }
   479→
   480→  async remove(): Promise<void> {
   481→    await storage.removeItem(this.key);
   482→  }
   483→}
   484→```
   485→
   486→**Guidelines**
   487→- One storage class per module/feature.
   488→- Types/interfaces live in `Models/` where appropriate.
   489→- Use `timestamp` for freshness/expiry strategies.
   490→- Never persist secrets/PII outside secure storage.
   491→- Keep payloads small and JSON-serializable.
   492→
   493→---
   494→
   495→## Checklist
   496→
   497→- [ ] Screens/Components follow **Hook Component pattern** (`index.ts` hook + `view.tsx` render)
   498→- [ ] Types live in **Models/**
   499→- [ ] Only **Zustand** for global/shared state under **/services/<domain>/store/**
   500→- [ ] UI never calls API directly (go through **/services**)
   501→- [ ] Code standards and styles patterns applied
   502→- [ ] Cache implemented via **GenericStorage** (when needed)
   503→- [ ] Routes and folder naming conventions followed
   504→
   505→---
   506→
   507→Happy shipping! 🚀

content.thinking: Agora vou ler os outros arquivos de repository para comparar o padrão:

Agora tenho todas as informações necessárias. Vou analisar:

1. **airlineMiles.repository.ts**: Usa uma **classe** (OOP) com instância singleton exportada
2. **parameter.repository.ts**: Usa **função pura** de mapeamento
3. **permission.repository.ts**: Usa **função pura** de mapeamento

De acordo com o Style Guide, na linha 232:
> **repository/**: maps transport to domain, aggregates sources.

E na seção de Services Architecture (linha 225-243), o repository é responsável por:
- Mapear dados de transporte para domínio
- Agregar fontes de dados
- Não deve ter lógica de negócio complexa

Olhando para os exemplos:
- Os arquivos `parameter.repository.ts` e `permission.repository.ts` seguem um padrão funcional, com funções puras de mapeamento
- O `airlineMiles.repository.ts` usa uma classe, o que é mais complexo e não está alinhado com os outros exemplos

O Style Guide menciona "class/" como uma camada separada (linha 206 e 230):
> **class/**: Class with logical requests

Então parece que:
- **repository/**: deve ter funções puras de mapeamento/transformação de dados
- **class/**: deve ter classes com lógica de requisições

O `airlineMiles.repository.ts` está misturando responsabilidades - tem uma classe que apenas chama a API, quando deveria ser:
1. A API vai em `api/`
2. A lógica com classes vai em `class/` (se necessário)
3. O repository deve ter funções de mapeamento

Vou explicar isso ao usuário de forma clara e direta.

I found information about Anthropic's Harness and the specific files you mentioned. Here's what the search revealed:

## Anthropic's Agent Harness System

Anthropic developed a two-fold solution to enable the Claude Agent SDK to work effectively across many context windows: an initializer agent that sets up the environment on the first run, and a coding agent that is tasked with making incremental progress in every session, while leaving clear artifacts for the next session.

### Key Files and Components

**progress.txt (claude-progress.txt):**
The key insight was finding a way for agents to quickly understand the state of work when starting with a fresh context window, which is accomplished with the claude-progress.txt file alongside the git history.(no content)This file serves as a session-to-session log of completed work and the model writes summaries of its progress in a progress file.

**features.json:**
A comprehensive feature list file (in JSON format) expands the user's high-level prompt into hundreds of specific, testable requirements. Anthropic uses JSON for this, as the model is less likely to inappropriately change or overwrite JSON files compared to Markdown files, and coding agents are prompted to only edit the "passes" field status.

### 2026 Context

The true breakout moment arrived in December 2025 and the first days of January 2026, with the harness system gaining significant attention and adoption in the developer community during this period.

// State Management
- PermissionStatus enum: IDLE | LOADING | SUCCESS | ERROR
- PermissionState: { hasRedeemed: boolean | null; status: PermissionStatus }
```

#### **B. API Layer** (`permission.api.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** HTTP requests

**Two endpoints:**
1. **getPermissionApi** - GET request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission`
   - Header: `codigoCliente: accountNumber`
   - Returns: Axios response with `PermissionDocumentResponse`

2. **savePermissionApi** - POST request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission`
   - Body: `PermissionDocumentInput` (with stringified value)
   - Returns: Axios response

#### **C. Repository Layer** (`permission.repository.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Data transformation/mapping

- **mapPermissionResponse()**: Extracts `value` from API response
  - Input: `PermissionDocumentResponse`
  - Output: `PermissionValue | null`
  - Logic: `response?.data?.value ?? null`

#### **D. Service Layer** (`permission.service.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Business logic orchestration

**Two main functions:**

1. **checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Sets loading state → Calls API → Maps response → Extracts `redeemedAtDate`
   - Returns: `boolean` (true if `redeemedAtDate` exists)
   - Error handling: Sets ERROR status, returns false
   - Status flow: IDLE → LOADING → SUCCESS/ERROR

2. **markAsRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Creates `PermissionDocumentInput` with current ISO date
   - Calls save API
   - Sets `hasRedeemed` to true on success
   - Returns: `boolean` (success/failure)
   - No explicit error status setting

#### **E. Store Layer** (`permission.store.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** State management (Zustand slice)

**State Structure:**
```typescript
rewardsPermission: PermissionState {
  status: PermissionStatus,
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null
}

rewardPermissionActions: {
  setStatus(status: PermissionStatus)
  setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed: boolean) // auto-sets status to SUCCESS
  reset() // resets to initial state
}
```

**Key Detail:** `setHasRedeemed` automatically sets status to SUCCESS

#### **F. Hook Layer** (`usePermission.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** React integration and caching

**Returns:**
```typescript
{
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null,
  isLoading: boolean,
  isError: boolean,
  checkHasRedeemed(options?: { forceRefresh?: boolean }): Promise<boolean>,
  markAsRedeemed(): Promise<boolean>
}
```

**Smart Caching:** `checkHasRedeemed` returns cached value if `hasRedeemed !== null` and `!forceRefresh`

---

### 4. EXISTING TEST PATTERNS

#### **Test File Organization:**
```
__tests__/
├── __mocks__/
│   └── test-store.ts (useTestRootStore with Zustand setup)
└── services/
    ├── airlineMiles/ (reference pattern)
    │   ├── api.test.ts
    │   ├── store.test.ts
    │   └── useAirlineMiles.test.tsx
    └── parameterPointsProgram/ (comprehensive pattern)
        ├── api/index.test.ts
        ├── store/index.test.ts
        ├── repository/index.test.ts
        └── services/index.test.ts
```

#### **Test-Store Setup** (`__mocks__/test-store.ts`)
```typescript
useTestRootStore: create<CardPlaceRootStore>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((...a) => ({
        ...setSlicesCardPlace(...a),
      })),
      { /* persist config */ }
    ),
    { name: 'RootStore' }
  )
)
```

#### **Test Pattern Examples:**

**API Tests** (airlineMiles example):
- Mock `@semparar/mf-app-user` API
- Test: Correct endpoint called
- Test: Response data returned
- Test: Error handling

**Store Tests** (airlineMiles example):
- Create slice with mock `set` function
- Test: Initial state values
- Test: Each action updates state correctly
- Test: State isolation between tests

**Service Tests** (parameterPointsProgram example):
- Mock API and repository layers
- Test: Success path with state updates
- Test: Empty data handling
- Test: API failures
- Test: Non-200 status codes
- Verify: Action call sequences

**Hook Tests** (airlineMiles example):
- Mock `useRootStore` with selector pattern
- Mock service functions
- Test: Initial state returned
- Test: Success flow with async `act`
- Test: Error handling
- Test: Function stability across rerenders

---

### 5. TESTING GAPS FOR PERMISSION FEATURE

**Currently Missing:**
- No test file exists for permission module (unlike airlineMiles and parameterPointsProgram)
- No mocks exist in `__tests__/__mocks__/` for permission

**What Needs Testing:**

| Layer | Test File Needed | Test Coverage |
|-------|------------------|---|
| **API** | `permission.api.test.ts` | getPermissionApi & savePermissionApi endpoints, headers, error handling |
| **Repository** | `permission.repository.test.ts` | mapPermissionResponse with various inputs |
| **Service** | `permission.service.test.ts` | checkHasRedeemed & markAsRedeemed flows, state management, error scenarios |
| **Store** | `permission.store.test.ts` | Slice creation, action updates, initial state, reset |
| **Hook** | `permission.hook.test.tsx` | usePermission with caching logic, forceRefresh, error states |

---

### 6. CRITICAL IMPLEMENTATION DETAILS TO TEST

**Specific Behaviors:**

1. **Permission Values are JSON Strings**
   - API input requires: `value: JSON.stringify({ invoiceCashbackRedemption: { redeemedAtDate } })`
   - API output requires: Parsing from stringified JSON

2. **Redemption Date Tracking**
   - Uses ISO string format: `new Date().toISOString()`
   - `hasRedeemed` = `Boolean(redeemedAtDate)`

3. **Status Codes**
   - Status field on `PermissionDocument`: 0 or 1
   - Redemption sets status: 1

4. **Hook Caching Logic**
   - If `hasRedeemed !== null` AND `!forceRefresh` → returns cached value
   - Requires `accountId` from `getClientNRC()`

5. **Error Handling Differences**
   - `checkHasRedeemed`: Sets ERROR status on failure
   - `markAsRedeemed`: No explicit error status, returns false

6. **Store Integration**
   - Registered in `/src/newArch/store/slices.ts` via `createPermissionSlice`
   - Integrated into `CardPlaceRootStore` type

---

### 7. USAGE CONTEXT

**Active Usage:**
- File: `/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx`
- Uses: `usePermission()` to get `hasRedeemed` and `markAsRedeemed`
- Lifecycle: Called on screen focus with ref tracking to prevent double-marking

---

### 8. COMPARISON WITH SIMILAR FEATURES

| Aspect | Permission | AirlineMiles | ParameterPointsProgram |
|--------|-----------|--------------|----------------------|
| **State Fields** | 2 (hasRedeemed, status) | 4 (redirectURL, isLoading, isError, errorMessage) | 3 (status, data, selectedCategory) |
| **API Methods** | 2 (GET/POST) | 1 (GET) | 1 (GET) |
| **Service Functions** | 2 | 1 | 1 |
| **Hook Caching** | Yes (smart) | No | No |
| **Error Status Handling** | Explicit ERROR status | Yes | Yes |
| **Tests Exist** | None | Yes | Yes |

---

### 9. RECOMMENDATIONS FOR TEST COVERAGE

**Priority Order:**

1. **High Priority**: Service layer tests (complex business logic, state management)
2. **High Priority**: Hook tests (caching behavior, error states)
3. **Medium Priority**: API tests (endpoint verification, error handling)
4. **Medium Priority**: Store tests (state updates, actions)
5. **Low Priority**: Repository tests (simple mapping function)

**Test Pattern to Follow:** Use parameterPointsProgram as template (more comprehensive than airlineMiles)

---

This exploration provides a complete map of the permission feature architecture, existing test patterns, and specific gaps that need to be addressed."}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":5,"cache_creation_input_tokens":994,"cache_read_input_tokens":45995,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":994,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard"}},"requestId":"req_011CX6J8d9SDW5hQ8uLKQzFv","type":"assistant","uuid":"93ca1c87-895a-42e3-9919-9db3f1839a68","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:46.043Z"}

"}]},"uuid":"6d2d4530-12b9-4233-9af7-245651608e64","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:46.308Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/store/airlineMiles.store.ts","content":"import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
import type { AirlineMilesActions, AirlineMilesState } from '../models';

export type AirlineMilesSlice = {
  airlineMiles: AirlineMilesState;
  airlineMilesActions: AirlineMilesActions;
};

const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
  redirectURL: '',
  isLoading: false,
  isError: false,
  errorMessage: '',
};

export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
  AirlineMilesSlice,
  [],
  [],
  AirlineMilesSlice
> = (set) => ({
  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,

  airlineMilesActions: {
    setRedirectURL: (url) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          redirectURL: url,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    setLoading: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading,
          ...(isLoading && {
            isError: false,
            errorMessage: '',
          }),
        },
      })),

    setError: (error) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: error,
        },
      })),

    clearError: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    reset: () =>
      set({
        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
      }),
  },
});

import { AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
import type {
  GetPermissionParams,
  PermissionDocumentInput,
  PermissionDocumentResponse,
} from '../models';

export async function getPermissionApi(
  params: GetPermissionParams
): Promise<AxiosResponse<PermissionDocumentResponse>> {
  const { accountNumber } = params;
  return api.get<PermissionDocumentResponse>('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission', {
    headers: {
      codigoCliente: accountNumber,
    },
  });
}

export async function savePermissionApi(
  document: PermissionDocumentInput
): Promise<AxiosResponse> {
  return api.post('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission', document);
}

"}]},"uuid":"8a1ef793-7fe8-4d3e-b4ef-82240ad40e68","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:06:52.804Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/permission.service.ts","content":"import { getPermissionApi, savePermissionApi } from '../api';
import { mapPermissionResponse } from '../repository';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus, type PermissionDocumentInput } from '../models';

export async function checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.LOADING);

    const response = await getPermissionApi({ accountNumber: accountId });

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300 && response?.data) {
      const permissionValue = mapPermissionResponse(response.data);
      const redeemedAt = permissionValue?.invoiceCashbackRedemption?.redeemedAtDate;
      const hasRedeemed = Boolean(redeemedAt);

      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed);
      return hasRedeemed;
    }

    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  } catch {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  }
}

export async function markAsRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    const document: PermissionDocumentInput = {
      codigoCliente: accountId,
      status: 1,
      value: JSON.stringify({
        invoiceCashbackRedemption: {
          redeemedAtDate: new Date().toISOString(),
        },
      }),
    };

    const response = await savePermissionApi(document);

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(true);
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

import { PermissionState, PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export interface PermissionActions {
  setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) => void;
  setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export interface PermissionSlice {
  rewardsPermission: PermissionState;
  rewardPermissionActions: PermissionActions;
}

const initialPermissionState: PermissionState = {
  status: PermissionStatus.IDLE,
  hasRedeemed: null,
};

export const createPermissionSlice: StateCreator<PermissionSlice, [], [], PermissionSlice> = (
  set
) => ({
  rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
  rewardPermissionActions: {
    setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: { ...state.rewardsPermission, status },
      })),
    setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: {
          ...state.rewardsPermission,
          hasRedeemed,
          status: PermissionStatus.SUCCESS,
        },
      })),
    reset: () =>
      set({
        rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
      }),
  },
});

import { getClientNRC } from '../../../../hooks/useSelectors';
import {
  checkHasRedeemed as checkHasRedeemedService,
  markAsRedeemed as markAsRedeemedService,
} from '../services';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export function usePermission() {
  const accountId = getClientNRC();

  const { hasRedeemed, status } = useRootStore((state) => state.rewardsPermission);

  const isLoading = status === PermissionStatus.LOADING;
  const isError = status === PermissionStatus.ERROR;

  const checkHasRedeemed = useCallback(
    async ({ forceRefresh = false }: { forceRefresh?: boolean } = {}): Promise<boolean> => {
      if (hasRedeemed !== null && !forceRefresh) {
        return hasRedeemed;
      }

      if (!accountId) {
        throw new Error('Expected accountId to be defined.');
      }

      return checkHasRedeemedService(accountId);
    },
    [accountId, hasRedeemed]
  );

  const markAsRedeemed = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    if (!accountId) {
      return false;
    }

    return markAsRedeemedService(accountId);
  }, [accountId]);

  return {
    hasRedeemed,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    checkHasRedeemed,
    markAsRedeemed,
  };
}

import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';

import { CardPlaceRootStore, setSlicesCardPlace } from '../../src/newArch/store/slices';

/**
 * ⚠️ Test only store - Do not import into production code ⚠️
 * If you are looking to register a new CardPlace slice for use in superApp,
 * use `setSlicesCardPlace` instead. That function consolidates all slices from
 * this package and is the entry point imported by the superApp.
 */
export const useTestRootStore = create<CardPlaceRootStore>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((...a) => ({
        ...setSlicesCardPlace(...a),
      })),
      {
        name: 'root-storage',
        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
        partialize: (s) => ({
          parameterPointsProgram: s.parameterPointsProgram,
        }),
        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<CardPlaceRootStore>) }),
      }
    ),
    { name: 'RootStore' }
  )
);

"}]},"uuid":"eea6ff7f-5c76-4e73-9a02-aa6e43739ae3","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:05.556Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/api.test.ts","content":"import { airlineMilesApi } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});

describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { useRootStore } from '../../../src/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services';

jest.mock('../../../src/store', () => ({
  useRootStore: Object.assign(
    jest.fn(),
    {
      getState: jest.fn(),
    }
  ),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services', () => ({
  airlineMilesService: {
    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

  api: {

  },
}));

describe('parameterPointsProgram API', () => {

  });

      data: {

import type { ParameterPointsProgramSlice } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/store';
import { ParameterPointsProgramStatus } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/models';

describe('parameterPointsProgram Store', () => {
  let state: ParameterPointsProgramSlice;
  let set: any;

  beforeEach(() => {
    state = {
      parameterPointsProgram: {
        status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
        data: undefined,
        selectedCategory: undefined,
      },
      parameterPointsProgramActions: {
        setStatus: jest.fn(),
        setData: jest.fn(),
        setSelectedCategory: jest.fn(),
        reset: jest.fn(),
      },
    };

    set = jest.fn((updater: any) => {
      if (typeof updater === 'function') {
        const newState = updater(state);
        Object.assign(state, newState);
      } else {
        Object.assign(state, updater);
      }
    });

    const get = jest.fn(() => state);
    const api = {};
    const slice = createParameterPointsProgramSlice(set, get, api as any);
    Object.assign(state, slice);
  });

  it('should have initial state', () => {
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram).toEqual({
      status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
      data: undefined,
      selectedCategory: undefined,
    });
  });

  it('should set loading state', () => {
    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
  });

  it('should set data and set status to success', () => {
    const mockData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setData(mockData);

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.data).toEqual(mockData);
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.SUCCESS);
  });

  it('should set error status', () => {
    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
  });

  it('should set selected category', () => {
    const mockCategory = {
      category: 'Pontos',
      value: {
        questions: [],
        order: 1,
        icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
      },
      dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
      status: 1,
      PK: 'pk1',
      dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
    };

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setSelectedCategory(mockCategory);

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.selectedCategory).toEqual(mockCategory);
  });

  it('should reset to initial state', () => {
    const mockData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setData(mockData);
    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.reset();

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram).toEqual({
      status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
      data: undefined,
      selectedCategory: undefined,
    });
  });

  it('should handle multiple state updates', () => {
    const mockData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setData(mockData);
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.data).toEqual(mockData);
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.SUCCESS);

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
  });
});

import { AirlineMilesSlice, createAirlineMilesSlice } from "../services/airlineMiles/store";
import { AdditionalCardSlice, createAdditionalCardSlice } from '../../services/additionalCard';
import { createParameterPointsProgramSlice, ParameterPointsProgramSlice, createPermissionSlice, PermissionSlice } from './rewardProgram';

export type CardPlaceRootStore =
  ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
  AdditionalCardSlice &
  PermissionSlice &
  AirlineMilesSlice;

export type Slice<T> = StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>;
export const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>) => slice as Slice<T>;

export function setSlicesCardPlace<T extends CardPlaceRootStore>(...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>) {
  return {
    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AdditionalCardSlice>(createAdditionalCardSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
  };
}

"}]},"uuid":"22e42e6d-2595-4d84-bada-6e34af5dd94f","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:21.372Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/screens/InvoiceCashbackSummary/index.tsx","content":"import React, { FC, useEffect, useState, useLayoutEffect, useMemo, useRef } from 'react';
import { NavigationProp, useNavigation, useIsFocused } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
import { connect } from 'react-redux';

import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
import { rescueActions, RescuePayload } from '../../redux/ducks/rescue';
import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';

import theme from '../../styles/theme';
import { InvoiceCashbackProps } from './models';
import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
import InvoiceCashbackSummaryView from './view';
import { bindActionCreators, Dispatch } from 'redux';
import { usePermission } from '../../newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';

const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({
  route,
  pointsReducer,
  rescueReducer,
  rescueRequest,
  rescueClear,
}) => {
  useScreenViewTracking({ route, title: 'Cashback na fatura' });
  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
  const isFocused = useIsFocused();
  const { height } = Dimensions.get('window');
  const { hasRedeemed, markAsRedeemed } = usePermission();
  const alreadyMarkedRef = useRef(false);
  const [hasAttemptedRescue, setHasAttemptedRescue] = useState(false);

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    if (isFocused) {
      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
      rescueClear();
    }
  }, [isFocused, rescueClear]);

  useFocusEffect(
    React.useCallback(() => {
      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
      rescueClear();
      return undefined;
    }, [rescueClear])
  );

  const conversionFactor = pointsReducer.conversionFactor;

import { AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
import type {
  GetPermissionParams,
  PermissionDocumentInput,
  PermissionDocumentResponse,
} from '../models';

export async function getPermissionApi(
  params: GetPermissionParams
): Promise<AxiosResponse<PermissionDocumentResponse>> {
  const { accountNumber } = params;
  return api.get<PermissionDocumentResponse>('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission', {
    headers: {
      codigoCliente: accountNumber,
    },
  });
}

export async function savePermissionApi(
  document: PermissionDocumentInput
): Promise<AxiosResponse> {
  return api.post('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission', document);
}

"}]},"uuid":"dbc1e82c-6cac-46f6-adf9-843c203f0746","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:27.390Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/permission.service.ts","content":"import { getPermissionApi, savePermissionApi } from '../api';
import { mapPermissionResponse } from '../repository';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus, type PermissionDocumentInput } from '../models';

export async function checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.LOADING);

    const response = await getPermissionApi({ accountNumber: accountId });

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300 && response?.data) {
      const permissionValue = mapPermissionResponse(response.data);
      const redeemedAt = permissionValue?.invoiceCashbackRedemption?.redeemedAtDate;
      const hasRedeemed = Boolean(redeemedAt);

      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed);
      return hasRedeemed;
    }

    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  } catch {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  }
}

export async function markAsRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    const document: PermissionDocumentInput = {
      codigoCliente: accountId,
      status: 1,
      value: JSON.stringify({
        invoiceCashbackRedemption: {
          redeemedAtDate: new Date().toISOString(),
        },
      }),
    };

    const response = await savePermissionApi(document);

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(true);
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

import { PermissionState, PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export interface PermissionActions {
  setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) => void;
  setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export interface PermissionSlice {
  rewardsPermission: PermissionState;
  rewardPermissionActions: PermissionActions;
}

const initialPermissionState: PermissionState = {
  status: PermissionStatus.IDLE,
  hasRedeemed: null,
};

export const createPermissionSlice: StateCreator<PermissionSlice, [], [], PermissionSlice> = (
  set
) => ({
  rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
  rewardPermissionActions: {
    setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: { ...state.rewardsPermission, status },
      })),
    setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: {
          ...state.rewardsPermission,
          hasRedeemed,
          status: PermissionStatus.SUCCESS,
        },
      })),
    reset: () =>
      set({
        rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
      }),
  },
});

"}]},"uuid":"e97d1fcc-d4af-4e27-bc7f-1ccca8e17bc0","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:27.390Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/hooks/usePermission.ts","content":"import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { getClientNRC } from '../../../../hooks/useSelectors';
import {
  checkHasRedeemed as checkHasRedeemedService,
  markAsRedeemed as markAsRedeemedService,
} from '../services';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export function usePermission() {
  const accountId = getClientNRC();

  const { hasRedeemed, status } = useRootStore((state) => state.rewardsPermission);

  const isLoading = status === PermissionStatus.LOADING;
  const isError = status === PermissionStatus.ERROR;

  const checkHasRedeemed = useCallback(
    async ({ forceRefresh = false }: { forceRefresh?: boolean } = {}): Promise<boolean> => {
      if (hasRedeemed !== null && !forceRefresh) {
        return hasRedeemed;
      }

      if (!accountId) {
        throw new Error('Expected accountId to be defined.');
      }

      return checkHasRedeemedService(accountId);
    },
    [accountId, hasRedeemed]
  );

  const markAsRedeemed = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    if (!accountId) {
      return false;
    }

    return markAsRedeemedService(accountId);
  }, [accountId]);

  return {
    hasRedeemed,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    checkHasRedeemed,
    markAsRedeemed,
  };
}

"}]},"uuid":"72918020-84bd-477d-b94d-3cd3f89e0132","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:40.103Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/api.test.ts","content":"import { airlineMilesApi } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});

"}]},"uuid":"90c0633b-aaf4-41eb-9327-8fd7ce42e07a","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:40.103Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/store.test.ts","content":"import { createAirlineMilesSlice, AirlineMilesSlice } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/store';

describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

"}]},"uuid":"c541d627-d871-4ddd-940a-5e884e98244b","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:40.103Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/useAirlineMiles.test.tsx","content":"import { renderHook, act } from '@testing-library/react-native';
import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { useRootStore } from '../../../src/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services';

jest.mock('../../../src/store', () => ({
  useRootStore: Object.assign(
    jest.fn(),
    {
      getState: jest.fn(),
    }
  ),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services', () => ({
  airlineMilesService: {
    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

```
InvoiceCashbackSummary (UI)

### 3. DETAILED LAYER ANALYSIS

#### **A. Models Layer** (`permission.model.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Type definitions and enums

```typescript
// Data Input/Output
- GetPermissionParams: { accountNumber: string }
- PermissionValue: { invoiceCashbackRedemption?: { redeemedAtDate?: string } }
- PermissionDocument: Raw API response object with status codes
- PermissionDocumentResponse: Wrapped API response { data: PermissionDocument }

// State Management
- PermissionStatus enum: IDLE | LOADING | SUCCESS | ERROR
- PermissionState: { hasRedeemed: boolean | null; status: PermissionStatus }
```

#### **B. API Layer** (`permission.api.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** HTTP requests

**Two endpoints:**
1. **getPermissionApi** - GET request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission`
   - Header: `codigoCliente: accountNumber`
   - Returns: Axios response with `PermissionDocumentResponse`

2. **savePermissionApi** - POST request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission`
   - Body: `PermissionDocumentInput` (with stringified value)
   - Returns: Axios response

#### **C. Repository Layer** (`permission.repository.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Data transformation/mapping

- **mapPermissionResponse()**: Extracts `value` from API response
  - Input: `PermissionDocumentResponse`
  - Output: `PermissionValue | null`
  - Logic: `response?.data?.value ?? null`

#### **D. Service Layer** (`permission.service.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Business logic orchestration

**Two main functions:**

1. **checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Sets loading state → Calls API → Maps response → Extracts `redeemedAtDate`
   - Returns: `boolean` (true if `redeemedAtDate` exists)
   - Error handling: Sets ERROR status, returns false
   - Status flow: IDLE → LOADING → SUCCESS/ERROR

2. **markAsRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Creates `PermissionDocumentInput` with current ISO date
   - Calls save API
   - Sets `hasRedeemed` to true on success
   - Returns: `boolean` (success/failure)
   - No explicit error status setting

#### **E. Store Layer** (`permission.store.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** State management (Zustand slice)

**State Structure:**
```typescript
rewardsPermission: PermissionState {
  status: PermissionStatus,
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null
}

rewardPermissionActions: {
  setStatus(status: PermissionStatus)
  setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed: boolean) // auto-sets status to SUCCESS
  reset() // resets to initial state
}
```

**Key Detail:** `setHasRedeemed` automatically sets status to SUCCESS

#### **F. Hook Layer** (`usePermission.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** React integration and caching

**Returns:**
```typescript
{
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null,
  isLoading: boolean,
  isError: boolean,
  checkHasRedeemed(options?: { forceRefresh?: boolean }): Promise<boolean>,
  markAsRedeemed(): Promise<boolean>
}
```

**Smart Caching:** `checkHasRedeemed` returns cached value if `hasRedeemed !== null` and `!forceRefresh`

};

const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
  redirectURL: '',
  isLoading: false,
  isError: false,
  errorMessage: '',
};

export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
  AirlineMilesSlice,
  [],
  [],
  AirlineMilesSlice
> = (set) => ({
  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,

  airlineMilesActions: {
    setRedirectURL: (url) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          redirectURL: url,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    setLoading: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading,
          ...(isLoading && {
            isError: false,
            errorMessage: '',
          }),
        },
      })),

    setError: (error) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: error,
        },
      })),

    clearError: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    reset: () =>
      set({
        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
      }),
  },
});

import { AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
import type {
  GetPermissionParams,
  PermissionDocumentInput,
  PermissionDocumentResponse,
} from '../models';

export async function getPermissionApi(
  params: GetPermissionParams
): Promise<AxiosResponse<PermissionDocumentResponse>> {
  const { accountNumber } = params;
  return api.get<PermissionDocumentResponse>('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission', {
    headers: {
      codigoCliente: accountNumber,
    },
  });
}

export async function savePermissionApi(
  document: PermissionDocumentInput
): Promise<AxiosResponse> {
  return api.post('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission', document);
}

"}]},"uuid":"8a1ef793-7fe8-4d3e-b4ef-82240ad40e68","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:06:52.804Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services/permission.service.ts","content":"import { getPermissionApi, savePermissionApi } from '../api';
import { mapPermissionResponse } from '../repository';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus, type PermissionDocumentInput } from '../models';

export async function checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.LOADING);

    const response = await getPermissionApi({ accountNumber: accountId });

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300 && response?.data) {
      const permissionValue = mapPermissionResponse(response.data);
      const redeemedAt = permissionValue?.invoiceCashbackRedemption?.redeemedAtDate;
      const hasRedeemed = Boolean(redeemedAt);

      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed);
      return hasRedeemed;
    }

    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  } catch {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  }
}

export async function markAsRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    const document: PermissionDocumentInput = {
      codigoCliente: accountId,
      status: 1,
      value: JSON.stringify({
        invoiceCashbackRedemption: {
          redeemedAtDate: new Date().toISOString(),
        },
      }),
    };

    const response = await savePermissionApi(document);

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(true);
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

import { PermissionState, PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export interface PermissionActions {
  setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) => void;
  setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export interface PermissionSlice {
  rewardsPermission: PermissionState;
  rewardPermissionActions: PermissionActions;
}

const initialPermissionState: PermissionState = {
  status: PermissionStatus.IDLE,
  hasRedeemed: null,
};

export const createPermissionSlice: StateCreator<PermissionSlice, [], [], PermissionSlice> = (
  set
) => ({
  rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
  rewardPermissionActions: {
    setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: { ...state.rewardsPermission, status },
      })),
    setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: {
          ...state.rewardsPermission,
          hasRedeemed,
          status: PermissionStatus.SUCCESS,
        },
      })),
    reset: () =>
      set({
        rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
      }),
  },
});

import { getClientNRC } from '../../../../hooks/useSelectors';
import {
  checkHasRedeemed as checkHasRedeemedService,
  markAsRedeemed as markAsRedeemedService,
} from '../services';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export function usePermission() {
  const accountId = getClientNRC();

  const { hasRedeemed, status } = useRootStore((state) => state.rewardsPermission);

  const isLoading = status === PermissionStatus.LOADING;
  const isError = status === PermissionStatus.ERROR;

  const checkHasRedeemed = useCallback(
    async ({ forceRefresh = false }: { forceRefresh?: boolean } = {}): Promise<boolean> => {
      if (hasRedeemed !== null && !forceRefresh) {
        return hasRedeemed;
      }

      if (!accountId) {
        throw new Error('Expected accountId to be defined.');
      }

      return checkHasRedeemedService(accountId);
    },
    [accountId, hasRedeemed]
  );

  const markAsRedeemed = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    if (!accountId) {
      return false;
    }

    return markAsRedeemedService(accountId);
  }, [accountId]);

  return {
    hasRedeemed,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    checkHasRedeemed,
    markAsRedeemed,
  };
}

import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import storage from '../../src/redux/store/storage';
import { CardPlaceRootStore, setSlicesCardPlace } from '../../src/newArch/store/slices';

/**
 * ⚠️ Test only store - Do not import into production code ⚠️
 * If you are looking to register a new CardPlace slice for use in superApp,
 * use `setSlicesCardPlace` instead. That function consolidates all slices from
 * this package and is the entry point imported by the superApp.
 */
export const useTestRootStore = create<CardPlaceRootStore>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((...a) => ({
        ...setSlicesCardPlace(...a),
      })),
      {
        name: 'root-storage',
        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
        partialize: (s) => ({
          parameterPointsProgram: s.parameterPointsProgram,
        }),
        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<CardPlaceRootStore>) }),
      }
    ),
    { name: 'RootStore' }
  )
);

"}]},"uuid":"eea6ff7f-5c76-4e73-9a02-aa6e43739ae3","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:05.556Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/api.test.ts","content":"import { airlineMilesApi } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});
