describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { useRootStore } from '../../../src/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services';

jest.mock('../../../src/store', () => ({
  useRootStore: Object.assign(
    jest.fn(),
    {
      getState: jest.fn(),
    }
  ),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services', () => ({
  airlineMilesService: {
    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

import type { ParameterPointsProgramSlice } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/store';
import { ParameterPointsProgramStatus } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/models';

describe('parameterPointsProgram Store', () => {
  let state: ParameterPointsProgramSlice;
  let set: any;

  beforeEach(() => {
    state = {
      parameterPointsProgram: {
        status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
        data: undefined,
        selectedCategory: undefined,
      },
      parameterPointsProgramActions: {
        setStatus: jest.fn(),
        setData: jest.fn(),
        setSelectedCategory: jest.fn(),
        reset: jest.fn(),
      },
    };

    set = jest.fn((updater: any) => {
      if (typeof updater === 'function') {
        const newState = updater(state);
        Object.assign(state, newState);
      } else {
        Object.assign(state, updater);
      }
    });

    const get = jest.fn(() => state);
    const api = {};
    const slice = createParameterPointsProgramSlice(set, get, api as any);
    Object.assign(state, slice);
  });

  it('should have initial state', () => {
    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram).toEqual({
      status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
      data: undefined,
      selectedCategory: undefined,
    });
  });

  it('should set loading state', () => {
    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setStatus(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);

    expect(state.parameterPointsProgram.status).toBe(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
  });

  it('should set data and set status to success', () => {
    const mockData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    state.parameterPointsProgramActions.setData(mockData);

import { getParameterPointsProgramApi } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/api';
import { mapParameterPointsProgramResponse } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository';
import { useTestRootStore } from '../../../__mocks__/test-store';
import { ParameterPointsProgramStatus } from '../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/models';

jest.mock('../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/api');
jest.mock('../../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/repository');
jest.mock('../../../__mocks__/test-store', () => ({
  useRootStore: {
    getState: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('parameterPointsProgram Service', () => {
  const mockSetStatus = jest.fn();
  const mockSetData = jest.fn();

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
    (useTestRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      parameterPointsProgram: {
        status: ParameterPointsProgramStatus.IDLE,
        data: undefined,
        selectedCategory: undefined,
      },
      parameterPointsProgramActions: {
        setStatus: mockSetStatus,
        setData: mockSetData,
        setSelectedCategory: jest.fn(),
        reset: jest.fn(),
      },
    });
  });

  it('should fetch and set data on success', async () => {
    const mockApiResponseData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    const mockApiResponse = {
      status: 200,
      data: mockApiResponseData,
    };

    const mockMappedData = [
      {
        category: 'Pontos',
        value: {
          questions: [
            {
              question: 'Question 1',
              answer: 'Answer 1',
            },
          ],
          order: 1,
          icon: 'icon-benefits' as const,
        },
        dateCreated: '2024-01-01',
        status: 1,
        PK: 'pk1',
        dateUpdated: '2024-01-01',
      },
    ];

    (getParameterPointsProgramApi as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockApiResponse);
    (mapParameterPointsProgramResponse as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue(mockMappedData);

    await getParameterPointsProgram();

    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
    expect(getParameterPointsProgramApi).toHaveBeenCalled();
    expect(mapParameterPointsProgramResponse).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockApiResponseData);
    expect(mockSetData).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockMappedData);
    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1);
  });

  it('should set error when API returns empty data array', async () => {
    const mockApiResponse = {
      status: 200,
      data: [],
    };

    (getParameterPointsProgramApi as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockApiResponse);

    await getParameterPointsProgram();

    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
    expect(mockSetData).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should set error when API call fails', async () => {
    const mockError = new Error('API Error');
    (getParameterPointsProgramApi as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

    await getParameterPointsProgram();

    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
    expect(mockSetData).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should set error when status is not 200', async () => {
    const mockApiResponse = {
      status: 500,
      data: [],
    };

    (getParameterPointsProgramApi as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockApiResponse);

    await getParameterPointsProgram();

    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.LOADING);
    expect(mockSetStatus).toHaveBeenCalledWith(ParameterPointsProgramStatus.ERROR);
    expect(mockSetData).not.toHaveBeenCalled();
  });
});

import { AirlineMilesSlice, createAirlineMilesSlice } from "../services/airlineMiles/store";
import { AdditionalCardSlice, createAdditionalCardSlice } from '../../services/additionalCard';
import { createParameterPointsProgramSlice, ParameterPointsProgramSlice, createPermissionSlice, PermissionSlice } from './rewardProgram';

export type CardPlaceRootStore =
  ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
  AdditionalCardSlice &
  PermissionSlice &
  AirlineMilesSlice;

export type Slice<T> = StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>;
export const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>) => slice as Slice<T>;

export function setSlicesCardPlace<T extends CardPlaceRootStore>(...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>) {
  return {
    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AdditionalCardSlice>(createAdditionalCardSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
  };
}

import { NavigationProp, useNavigation, useIsFocused } from '@react-navigation/native';
import { Dimensions } from 'react-native';
import { connect } from 'react-redux';

import { useScreenViewTracking } from '../../hooks/tracking';
import { PointsActions } from '../../redux/ducks/points';
import { rescueActions, RescuePayload } from '../../redux/ducks/rescue';
import { useFocusEffect } from '@react-navigation/native';

import theme from '../../styles/theme';
import { InvoiceCashbackProps } from './models';
import { PropsRootStack } from '../../routes/Models';
import InvoiceCashbackSummaryView from './view';
import { bindActionCreators, Dispatch } from 'redux';
import { usePermission } from '../../newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { AppReducers } from '../../redux/reducers/Models';

const InvoiceCashbackSummary: FC<InvoiceCashbackProps> = ({
  route,
  pointsReducer,
  rescueReducer,
  rescueRequest,
  rescueClear,
}) => {
  useScreenViewTracking({ route, title: 'Cashback na fatura' });
  const navigation = useNavigation<NavigationProp<PropsRootStack>>();
  const isFocused = useIsFocused();
  const { height } = Dimensions.get('window');
  const { hasRedeemed, markAsRedeemed } = usePermission();
  const alreadyMarkedRef = useRef(false);
  const [hasAttemptedRescue, setHasAttemptedRescue] = useState(false);

  useLayoutEffect(() => {
    if (isFocused) {
      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
      rescueClear();
    }
  }, [isFocused, rescueClear]);

  useFocusEffect(
    React.useCallback(() => {
      setHasAttemptedRescue(false);
      rescueClear();
      return undefined;
    }, [rescueClear])
  );

  const conversionFactor = pointsReducer.conversionFactor;

import { AxiosResponse } from 'axios';
import type {
  GetPermissionParams,
  PermissionDocumentInput,
  PermissionDocumentResponse,
} from '../models';

export async function getPermissionApi(
  params: GetPermissionParams
): Promise<AxiosResponse<PermissionDocumentResponse>> {
  const { accountNumber } = params;
  return api.get<PermissionDocumentResponse>('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission', {
    headers: {
      codigoCliente: accountNumber,
    },
  });
}

export async function savePermissionApi(
  document: PermissionDocumentInput
): Promise<AxiosResponse> {
  return api.post('fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission', document);
}

import { mapPermissionResponse } from '../repository';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus, type PermissionDocumentInput } from '../models';

export async function checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.LOADING);

    const response = await getPermissionApi({ accountNumber: accountId });

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300 && response?.data) {
      const permissionValue = mapPermissionResponse(response.data);
      const redeemedAt = permissionValue?.invoiceCashbackRedemption?.redeemedAtDate;
      const hasRedeemed = Boolean(redeemedAt);

      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed);
      return hasRedeemed;
    }

    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  } catch {
    rewardPermissionActions.setStatus(PermissionStatus.ERROR);
    return false;
  }
}

export async function markAsRedeemed(accountId: string): Promise<boolean> {
  const { rewardPermissionActions } = useRootStore.getState();

  try {
    const document: PermissionDocumentInput = {
      codigoCliente: accountId,
      status: 1,
      value: JSON.stringify({
        invoiceCashbackRedemption: {
          redeemedAtDate: new Date().toISOString(),
        },
      }),
    };

    const response = await savePermissionApi(document);

    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
      rewardPermissionActions.setHasRedeemed(true);
      return true;
    }

    return false;
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

import { PermissionState, PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export interface PermissionActions {
  setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) => void;
  setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) => void;
  reset: () => void;
}

export interface PermissionSlice {
  rewardsPermission: PermissionState;
  rewardPermissionActions: PermissionActions;
}

const initialPermissionState: PermissionState = {
  status: PermissionStatus.IDLE,
  hasRedeemed: null,
};

export const createPermissionSlice: StateCreator<PermissionSlice, [], [], PermissionSlice> = (
  set
) => ({
  rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
  rewardPermissionActions: {
    setStatus: (status: PermissionStatus) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: { ...state.rewardsPermission, status },
      })),
    setHasRedeemed: (hasRedeemed: boolean) =>
      set((state) => ({
        rewardsPermission: {
          ...state.rewardsPermission,
          hasRedeemed,
          status: PermissionStatus.SUCCESS,
        },
      })),
    reset: () =>
      set({
        rewardsPermission: initialPermissionState,
      }),
  },
});

import { getClientNRC } from '../../../../hooks/useSelectors';
import {
  checkHasRedeemed as checkHasRedeemedService,
  markAsRedeemed as markAsRedeemedService,
} from '../services';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { PermissionStatus } from '../models';

export function usePermission() {
  const accountId = getClientNRC();

  const { hasRedeemed, status } = useRootStore((state) => state.rewardsPermission);

  const isLoading = status === PermissionStatus.LOADING;
  const isError = status === PermissionStatus.ERROR;

  const checkHasRedeemed = useCallback(
    async ({ forceRefresh = false }: { forceRefresh?: boolean } = {}): Promise<boolean> => {
      if (hasRedeemed !== null && !forceRefresh) {
        return hasRedeemed;
      }

      if (!accountId) {
        throw new Error('Expected accountId to be defined.');
      }

      return checkHasRedeemedService(accountId);
    },
    [accountId, hasRedeemed]
  );

  const markAsRedeemed = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    if (!accountId) {
      return false;
    }

    return markAsRedeemedService(accountId);
  }, [accountId]);

  return {
    hasRedeemed,
    isLoading,
    isError,
    checkHasRedeemed,
    markAsRedeemed,
  };
}

"}]},"uuid":"72918020-84bd-477d-b94d-3cd3f89e0132","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:40.103Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/api.test.ts","content":"import { airlineMilesApi } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});

describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

### 3. DETAILED LAYER ANALYSIS

#### **A. Models Layer** (`permission.model.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Type definitions and enums

```typescript
// Data Input/Output
- GetPermissionParams: { accountNumber: string }
- PermissionValue: { invoiceCashbackRedemption?: { redeemedAtDate?: string } }
- PermissionDocument: Raw API response object with status codes
- PermissionDocumentResponse: Wrapped API response { data: PermissionDocument }

// State Management
- PermissionStatus enum: IDLE | LOADING | SUCCESS | ERROR
- PermissionState: { hasRedeemed: boolean | null; status: PermissionStatus }
```

#### **B. API Layer** (`permission.api.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** HTTP requests

**Two endpoints:**
1. **getPermissionApi** - GET request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/consult-permission`
   - Header: `codigoCliente: accountNumber`
   - Returns: Axios response with `PermissionDocumentResponse`

2. **savePermissionApi** - POST request
   - Endpoint: `/fintech/v1/rewardProgram/insert-permission`
   - Body: `PermissionDocumentInput` (with stringified value)
   - Returns: Axios response

#### **C. Repository Layer** (`permission.repository.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Data transformation/mapping

- **mapPermissionResponse()**: Extracts `value` from API response
  - Input: `PermissionDocumentResponse`
  - Output: `PermissionValue | null`
  - Logic: `response?.data?.value ?? null`

#### **D. Service Layer** (`permission.service.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** Business logic orchestration

**Two main functions:**

1. **checkHasRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Sets loading state → Calls API → Maps response → Extracts `redeemedAtDate`
   - Returns: `boolean` (true if `redeemedAtDate` exists)
   - Error handling: Sets ERROR status, returns false
   - Status flow: IDLE → LOADING → SUCCESS/ERROR

2. **markAsRedeemed(accountId: string)**
   - Creates `PermissionDocumentInput` with current ISO date
   - Calls save API
   - Sets `hasRedeemed` to true on success
   - Returns: `boolean` (success/failure)
   - No explicit error status setting

#### **E. Store Layer** (`permission.store.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** State management (Zustand slice)

**State Structure:**
```typescript
rewardsPermission: PermissionState {
  status: PermissionStatus,
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null
}

rewardPermissionActions: {
  setStatus(status: PermissionStatus)
  setHasRedeemed(hasRedeemed: boolean) // auto-sets status to SUCCESS
  reset() // resets to initial state
}
```

**Key Detail:** `setHasRedeemed` automatically sets status to SUCCESS

#### **F. Hook Layer** (`usePermission.ts`)
**Responsibilities:** React integration and caching

**Returns:**
```typescript
{
  hasRedeemed: boolean | null,
  isLoading: boolean,
  isError: boolean,
  checkHasRedeemed(options?: { forceRefresh?: boolean }): Promise<boolean>,
  markAsRedeemed(): Promise<boolean>
}
```

**Smart Caching:** `checkHasRedeemed` returns cached value if `hasRedeemed !== null` and `!forceRefresh`

import type { AirlineMilesActions, AirlineMilesState } from '../models';

export type AirlineMilesSlice = {
  airlineMiles: AirlineMilesState;
  airlineMilesActions: AirlineMilesActions;
};

const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
  redirectURL: '',
  isLoading: false,
  isError: false,
  errorMessage: '',
};

export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
  AirlineMilesSlice,
  [],
  [],
  AirlineMilesSlice
> = (set) => ({
  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,

  airlineMilesActions: {
    setRedirectURL: (url) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          redirectURL: url,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    setLoading: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading,
          ...(isLoading && {
            isError: false,
            errorMessage: '',
          }),
        },
      })),

    setError: (error) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: error,
        },
      })),

    clearError: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    reset: () =>
      set({
        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
      }),
  },

":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/api/airlineMiles.api.ts","content":"import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';
import type { AirlineMilesTokenParams, AirlineMilesTokenResponse } from '../models';

export class AirlineMilesApi {
  async getToken(params: AirlineMilesTokenParams): Promise<AirlineMilesTokenResponse> {
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(params);
    const response = await api.get<AirlineMilesTokenResponse>(
      `/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?${urlParams.toString()}`
    );
    return response.data;
  }
}

export const airlineMilesApi = new AirlineMilesApi();

import { render } from '@testing-library/react-native';
import AirlineMilesMarketplace from '../../../src/screens/AirlineMilesMarketplace';
import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import ApiError from '../../../src/atomic/organisms/ApiError';
import AnimationArrows from '../../../src/atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows';
import { TestProvider } from '../../__mocks__/utils/test-provider';

let focusEffectCallback: (() => void) | null = null;

jest.mock('@react-navigation/native', () => ({
  useNavigation: jest.fn(),
  useRoute: jest.fn(),
  useNavigationState: jest.fn(() => 'AirlineMilesMarketplace'),
  useFocusEffect: jest.fn((callback) => {
    focusEffectCallback = callback;
  }),
  useIsFocused: jest.fn(() => true),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram', () => ({
  useAirlineMiles: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/hooks/tracking', () => ({
  useScreenViewTracking: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('react-native-webview', () => {
  const { View } = require('react-native');
  return {
    WebView: (props: any) => <View testID="webview" {...props} />,
  };
});

jest.mock('react-native', () => {
  const RN = jest.requireActual('react-native');
  return {
    ...RN,
    useWindowDimensions: () => ({ width: 375, height: 812 }),
    BackHandler: {
      addEventListener: jest.fn(() => ({ remove: jest.fn() })),
    },
  };
});

describe('AirlineMilesMarketplace', () => {
  const mockGoBack = jest.fn();
  const mockNavigate = jest.fn();
  const mockFetchToken = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true);
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockNavigation = {
    goBack: mockGoBack,
    navigate: mockNavigate,
  } as any;

  const mockRoute = {
    key: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace',
    name: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace' as const,
    params: {},
  };

  const defaultProps = {
    navigation: mockNavigation,
    route: mockRoute,
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
    focusEffectCallback = null;
  });

  it('should render AnimationArrows when loading', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: true,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(AnimationArrows)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when there is an error', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: true,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when redirectURL is empty', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render WebView when redirectURL is available', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com/marketplace',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId, getByText } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(getByTestId('webview')).toBeTruthy();
    expect(getByText('Milhas Aéreas')).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should register useFocusEffect callback', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(focusEffectCallback).toBeDefined();
  });

  it('should pass correct uri to WebView', () => {
    const testUrl = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc123';
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: testUrl,
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    const webView = getByTestId('webview');
    expect(webView.props.source).toEqual({ uri: testUrl });
  });
});

import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import storage from '../../src/redux/store/storage';
import { CardPlaceRootStore, setSlicesCardPlace } from '../../src/newArch/store/slices';

/**
 * ⚠️ Test only store - Do not import into production code ⚠️
 * If you are looking to register a new CardPlace slice for use in superApp,
 * use `setSlicesCardPlace` instead. That function consolidates all slices from
 * this package and is the entry point imported by the superApp.
 */
export const useTestRootStore = create<CardPlaceRootStore>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((...a) => ({
        ...setSlicesCardPlace(...a),
      })),
      {
        name: 'root-storage',
        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),

import { Provider } from 'react-redux';
import { DeepPartial } from 'redux';
import configureMockStore from 'redux-mock-store';

import rootReducers from '../../../src/redux/reducers';

export type RootReducers = DeepPartial<typeof rootReducers>;

const ReduxMockProvider: React.FC<{
  initialState?: RootReducers;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}> = ({ children, initialState = {} }) => {
  const mockStore = configureMockStore([]);
  const store = mockStore(initialState);

  return <Provider store={store}>{children}</Provider>;
};

export default ReduxMockProvider;

import { render } from '@testing-library/react-native';

import ApiError from '../../../src/atomic/organisms/ApiError';
import AnimationArrows from '../../../src/atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows';
import { TestProvider } from '../../__mocks__/utils/test-provider';

let focusEffectCallback: (() => void) | null = null;

jest.mock('@react-navigation/native', () => ({
  useNavigation: jest.fn(),
  useRoute: jest.fn(),
  useNavigationState: jest.fn(() => 'AirlineMilesMarketplace'),
  useFocusEffect: jest.fn((callback) => {
    focusEffectCallback = callback;
  }),
  useIsFocused: jest.fn(() => true),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram', () => ({
  useAirlineMiles: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/hooks/tracking', () => ({
  useScreenViewTracking: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('react-native-webview', () => {
  const { View } = require('react-native');
  return {
    WebView: (props: any) => <View testID="webview" {...props} />,
  };
});

jest.mock('react-native', () => {
  const RN = jest.requireActual('react-native');
  return {
    ...RN,
    useWindowDimensions: () => ({ width: 375, height: 812 }),
    BackHandler: {
      addEventListener: jest.fn(() => ({ remove: jest.fn() })),
    },
  };
});

describe('AirlineMilesMarketplace', () => {
  const mockGoBack = jest.fn();
  const mockNavigate = jest.fn();
  const mockFetchToken = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true);
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockNavigation = {
    goBack: mockGoBack,
    navigate: mockNavigate,
  } as any;

  const mockRoute = {
    key: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace',
    name: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace' as const,
    params: {},
  };

  const defaultProps = {
    navigation: mockNavigation,
    route: mockRoute,
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
    focusEffectCallback = null;
  });

  it('should render AnimationArrows when loading', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: true,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(AnimationArrows)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when there is an error', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: true,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when redirectURL is empty', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render WebView when redirectURL is available', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com/marketplace',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId, getByText } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(getByTestId('webview')).toBeTruthy();
    expect(getByText('Milhas Aéreas')).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should register useFocusEffect callback', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(focusEffectCallback).toBeDefined();
  });

  it('should pass correct uri to WebView', () => {
    const testUrl = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc123';
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: testUrl,
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    const webView = getByTestId('webview');
    expect(webView.props.source).toEqual({ uri: testUrl });
  });
});

import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});

describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

"}]},"uuid":"6c5cc94e-28df-4f69-b934-f6ee94121209","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:03.422Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/useAirlineMiles.test.tsx","content":"import { renderHook, act } from '@testing-library/react-native';
import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { useRootStore } from '../../../src/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services';

jest.mock('../../../src/store', () => ({
  useRootStore: Object.assign(
    jest.fn(),
    {
      getState: jest.fn(),
    }
  ),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services', () => ({
  airlineMilesService: {
    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

import { AirlineMilesSlice, createAirlineMilesSlice } from "../services/airlineMiles/store";
import { AdditionalCardSlice, createAdditionalCardSlice } from '../../services/additionalCard';
import { createParameterPointsProgramSlice, ParameterPointsProgramSlice, createPermissionSlice, PermissionSlice } from './rewardProgram';

export type CardPlaceRootStore =
  ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
  AdditionalCardSlice &
  PermissionSlice &
  AirlineMilesSlice;

export type Slice<T> = StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>;
export const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>) => slice as Slice<T>;

export function setSlicesCardPlace<T extends CardPlaceRootStore>(...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>) {
  return {
    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AdditionalCardSlice>(createAdditionalCardSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
  };
}

import type { AirlineMilesActions, AirlineMilesState } from '../models';

export type AirlineMilesSlice = {
  airlineMiles: AirlineMilesState;
  airlineMilesActions: AirlineMilesActions;
};

const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
  redirectURL: '',
  isLoading: false,
  isError: false,
  errorMessage: '',
};

export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
  AirlineMilesSlice,
  [],
  [],
  AirlineMilesSlice
> = (set) => ({
  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,

  airlineMilesActions: {
    setRedirectURL: (url) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          redirectURL: url,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    setLoading: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading,
          ...(isLoading && {
            isError: false,
            errorMessage: '',
          }),
        },
      })),

    setError: (error) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: error,
        },
      })),

    clearError: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    reset: () =>
      set({
        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
      }),
  },
});

import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../services';
import { AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS } from '../models';

export const useAirlineMiles = () => {
  const airlineMiles = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.airlineMiles));

  const fetchAirlineMilesToken = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    const { airlineMilesActions } = useRootStore.getState();

    try {
      airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      const response = await airlineMilesService.getToken(AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS);

      if (response.status.codigoRetorno === 0) {
        airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(response.dados.redirectURL);
        return true;
      } else {
        airlineMilesActions.setError(response.status.mensagem || 'Failed to get token');
        return false;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      airlineMilesActions.setError('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
      return false;
    }
  }, []);

  const reset = useCallback(() => {
    useRootStore.getState().airlineMilesActions.reset();
  }, []);

  return {
    ...airlineMiles,
    fetchAirlineMilesToken,
    reset,
  };
};

import type { AirlineMilesTokenParams, AirlineMilesTokenResponse } from '../models';

export class AirlineMilesService {
  private readonly repository: AirlineMilesRepository;

  constructor() {
    this.repository = new AirlineMilesRepository();
  }

  async getToken(params: AirlineMilesTokenParams): Promise<AirlineMilesTokenResponse> {
    return this.repository.getToken(params);
  }
}

"}]},"uuid":"234ace53-33dd-402b-bf79-47a20602817e","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:35.389Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/store/airlineMiles.store.ts","content":"import type { StateCreator } from 'zustand';
import type { AirlineMilesActions, AirlineMilesState } from '../models';

export type AirlineMilesSlice = {
  airlineMiles: AirlineMilesState;
  airlineMilesActions: AirlineMilesActions;
};

const initialAirlineMilesState: AirlineMilesState = {
  redirectURL: '',
  isLoading: false,
  isError: false,
  errorMessage: '',
};

export const createAirlineMilesSlice: StateCreator<
  AirlineMilesSlice,
  [],
  [],
  AirlineMilesSlice
> = (set) => ({
  airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,

  airlineMilesActions: {
    setRedirectURL: (url) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          redirectURL: url,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    setLoading: (isLoading) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading,
          ...(isLoading && {
            isError: false,
            errorMessage: '',
          }),
        },
      })),

    setError: (error) =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isLoading: false,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: error,
        },
      })),

    clearError: () =>
      set((state) => ({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...state.airlineMiles,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      })),

    reset: () =>
      set({
        airlineMiles: initialAirlineMilesState,
      }),
  },
});

describe('AirlineMilesSlice', () => {
  let slice: AirlineMilesSlice;
  let mockSet: jest.Mock;

  beforeEach(() => {
    mockSet = jest.fn();
    slice = createAirlineMilesSlice(mockSet, jest.fn(), {} as any);
  });

  describe('initial state', () => {
    it('should have correct initial values', () => {
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe('');
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(slice.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });
  });

  describe('actions', () => {
    it('should set loading state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should set redirectURL', () => {
      const url = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(url);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.redirectURL).toBe(url);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should set error', () => {
      const errorMessage = 'Failed to load';
      slice.airlineMilesActions.setError(errorMessage);

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({ airlineMiles: slice.airlineMiles });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe(errorMessage);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(true);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isLoading).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should clear error', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.clearError();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function));

      const updateFn = mockSet.mock.calls[0][0];
      const newState = updateFn({
        airlineMiles: {
          ...slice.airlineMiles,
          isError: true,
          errorMessage: 'some error',
        },
      });

      expect(newState.airlineMiles.isError).toBe(false);
      expect(newState.airlineMiles.errorMessage).toBe('');
    });

    it('should reset state', () => {
      slice.airlineMilesActions.reset();

      expect(mockSet).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
        airlineMiles: {
          redirectURL: '',
          isLoading: false,
          isError: false,
          errorMessage: '',
        },
      });
    });
  });
});

import { AirlineMilesSlice, createAirlineMilesSlice } from "../services/airlineMiles/store";
import { AdditionalCardSlice, createAdditionalCardSlice } from '../../services/additionalCard';
import { createParameterPointsProgramSlice, ParameterPointsProgramSlice, createPermissionSlice, PermissionSlice } from './rewardProgram';

export type CardPlaceRootStore =
  ParameterPointsProgramSlice &
  AdditionalCardSlice &
  PermissionSlice &
  AirlineMilesSlice;

export type Slice<T> = StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>;
export const asSlice = <T>(slice: StateCreator<CardPlaceRootStore, [], [], T>) => slice as Slice<T>;

export function setSlicesCardPlace<T extends CardPlaceRootStore>(...a: Parameters<Slice<T>>) {
  return {
    ...asSlice<ParameterPointsProgramSlice>(createParameterPointsProgramSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AdditionalCardSlice>(createAdditionalCardSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<PermissionSlice>(createPermissionSlice)(...a),
    ...asSlice<AirlineMilesSlice>(createAirlineMilesSlice)(...a),
  };
}

"}]},"uuid":"99c9f180-ec9c-447d-a773-da9eeb3a03cb","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:46.666Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/api.test.ts","content":"import { airlineMilesApi } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { api } from '@semparar/mf-app-user';

jest.mock('@semparar/mf-app-user', () => ({
  api: {
    get: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

describe('AirlineMilesApi', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
  });

  describe('getToken', () => {
    it('should call correct endpoint with params', async () => {
      const mockResponse = {
        data: {
          status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
          dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
        },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(api.get).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
        '/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?redirectTo=MARKETPLACE&catalog=MILEAGE'
      );
    });

    it('should return response data', async () => {
      const mockData = {
        status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
        dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
      };

      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue({ data: mockData });

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };
      const result = await airlineMilesApi.getToken(params);

      expect(result).toEqual(mockData);
    });

    it('should handle API errors', async () => {
      const mockError = new Error('Network Error');
      (api.get as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(mockError);

      const params = { redirectTo: 'MARKETPLACE', catalog: 'MILEAGE' };

      await expect(airlineMilesApi.getToken(params)).rejects.toThrow('Network Error');
    });
  });
});

"}]},"uuid":"c09aabf6-c801-41ba-9587-f5018a5811c1","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:46.666Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/__tests__/services/airlineMiles/useAirlineMiles.test.tsx","content":"import { renderHook, act } from '@testing-library/react-native';
import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import { useRootStore } from '../../../src/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services';

jest.mock('../../../src/store', () => ({
  useRootStore: Object.assign(
    jest.fn(),
    {
      getState: jest.fn(),
    }
  ),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/services', () => ({
  airlineMilesService: {
    getToken: jest.fn(),
  },
}));

jest.mock('zustand/shallow', () => ({
  useShallow: (selector: any) => selector,
}));

describe('useAirlineMiles', () => {
  const mockSetLoading = jest.fn();
  const mockSetRedirectURL = jest.fn();
  const mockSetError = jest.fn();
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockActions = {
    setLoading: mockSetLoading,
    setRedirectURL: mockSetRedirectURL,
    setError: mockSetError,
    reset: mockReset,
  };

  const mockState = {
    redirectURL: '',
    isLoading: false,
    isError: false,
    errorMessage: '',
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();

    (useRootStore as unknown as jest.Mock).mockImplementation((selector: any) => {
      if (typeof selector === 'function') {
        return selector({ airlineMiles: mockState });
      }
      return mockState;
    });

    (useRootStore.getState as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      airlineMilesActions: mockActions,
    });
  });

  it('should return initial state', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    expect(result.current.redirectURL).toBe('');
    expect(result.current.isLoading).toBe(false);
    expect(result.current.isError).toBe(false);
  });

  it('should fetch token successfully', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 0, mensagem: 'Success' },
      dados: { redirectURL: 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = false;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(true);
    expect(mockSetLoading).toHaveBeenCalledWith(true);
    expect(mockSetRedirectURL).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockResponse.dados.redirectURL);
  });

  it('should handle API error response', async () => {
    const mockResponse = {
      status: { codigoRetorno: 1, mensagem: 'Token expired' },
      dados: { redirectURL: '' },
    };

    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockResolvedValue(mockResponse);

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Token expired');
  });

  it('should handle network error', async () => {
    (airlineMilesService.getToken as jest.Mock).mockRejectedValue(new Error('Network error'));

    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    let fetchResult: boolean = true;
    await act(async () => {
      fetchResult = await result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken();
    });

    expect(fetchResult).toBe(false);
    expect(mockSetError).toHaveBeenCalledWith('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
  });

  it('should call reset', () => {
    const { result } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    act(() => {
      result.current.reset();
    });

    expect(mockReset).toHaveBeenCalled();
  });

  it('should have stable function references', () => {
    const { result, rerender } = renderHook(() => useAirlineMiles());

    const initialFetch = result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken;
    const initialReset = result.current.reset;

    rerender({});

    expect(result.current.fetchAirlineMilesToken).toBe(initialFetch);
    expect(result.current.reset).toBe(initialReset);
  });
});

"}]},"uuid":"e45e4d3f-61fd-4491-99c2-f1ee6ab53440","timestamp":"2026-01-14T00:07:52.762Z","toolUseResult":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/newArch/store/rewardProgram/hooks/useAirlineMiles.ts","content":"import { useCallback } from 'react';
import { useShallow } from 'zustand/shallow';
import { useRootStore } from '~/store';
import { airlineMilesService } from '../services';
import { AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS } from '../models';

export const useAirlineMiles = () => {
  const airlineMiles = useRootStore(useShallow((state) => state.airlineMiles));

  const fetchAirlineMilesToken = useCallback(async (): Promise<boolean> => {
    const { airlineMilesActions } = useRootStore.getState();

    try {
      airlineMilesActions.setLoading(true);

      const response = await airlineMilesService.getToken(AIRLINE_MILES_PARAMS);

      if (response.status.codigoRetorno === 0) {
        airlineMilesActions.setRedirectURL(response.dados.redirectURL);
        return true;
      } else {
        airlineMilesActions.setError(response.status.mensagem || 'Failed to get token');
        return false;
      }
    } catch (error) {
      airlineMilesActions.setError('Failed to load airline miles marketplace');
      return false;
    }
  }, []);

  const reset = useCallback(() => {
    useRootStore.getState().airlineMilesActions.reset();
  }, []);

  return {
    ...airlineMiles,
    fetchAirlineMilesToken,
    reset,
  };
};

import type { AirlineMilesTokenParams, AirlineMilesTokenResponse } from '../models';

export class AirlineMilesApi {
  async getToken(params: AirlineMilesTokenParams): Promise<AirlineMilesTokenResponse> {
    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(params);
    const response = await api.get<AirlineMilesTokenResponse>(
      `/marketplace/v1/vertem/getToken?${urlParams.toString()}`
    );
    return response.data;
  }
}

export class AirlineMilesRepository {
  private readonly api: AirlineMilesApi;

  }

import { render } from '@testing-library/react-native';
import AirlineMilesMarketplace from '../../../src/screens/AirlineMilesMarketplace';
import { useAirlineMiles } from '../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram';
import ApiError from '../../../src/atomic/organisms/ApiError';
import AnimationArrows from '../../../src/atomic/atoms/AnimationArrows';
import { TestProvider } from '../../__mocks__/utils/test-provider';

let focusEffectCallback: (() => void) | null = null;

jest.mock('@react-navigation/native', () => ({
  useNavigation: jest.fn(),
  useRoute: jest.fn(),
  useNavigationState: jest.fn(() => 'AirlineMilesMarketplace'),
  useFocusEffect: jest.fn((callback) => {
    focusEffectCallback = callback;
  }),
  useIsFocused: jest.fn(() => true),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/newArch/store/rewardProgram', () => ({
  useAirlineMiles: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('../../../src/hooks/tracking', () => ({
  useScreenViewTracking: jest.fn(),
}));

jest.mock('react-native-webview', () => {
  const { View } = require('react-native');
  return {
    WebView: (props: any) => <View testID="webview" {...props} />,
  };
});

jest.mock('react-native', () => {
  const RN = jest.requireActual('react-native');
  return {
    ...RN,
    useWindowDimensions: () => ({ width: 375, height: 812 }),
    BackHandler: {
      addEventListener: jest.fn(() => ({ remove: jest.fn() })),
    },
  };
});

describe('AirlineMilesMarketplace', () => {
  const mockGoBack = jest.fn();
  const mockNavigate = jest.fn();
  const mockFetchToken = jest.fn().mockResolvedValue(true);
  const mockReset = jest.fn();

  const mockNavigation = {
    goBack: mockGoBack,
    navigate: mockNavigate,
  } as any;

  const mockRoute = {
    key: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace',
    name: 'AirlineMilesMarketplace' as const,
    params: {},
  };

  const defaultProps = {
    navigation: mockNavigation,
    route: mockRoute,
  };

  beforeEach(() => {
    jest.clearAllMocks();
    focusEffectCallback = null;
  });

  it('should render AnimationArrows when loading', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: true,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(AnimationArrows)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when there is an error', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: true,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render ApiError when redirectURL is empty', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: '',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { UNSAFE_getByType } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(UNSAFE_getByType(ApiError)).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should render WebView when redirectURL is available', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com/marketplace',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId, getByText } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(getByTestId('webview')).toBeTruthy();
    expect(getByText('Milhas Aéreas')).toBeTruthy();
  });

  it('should register useFocusEffect callback', () => {
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: 'https://example.com',
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    expect(focusEffectCallback).toBeDefined();
  });

  it('should pass correct uri to WebView', () => {
    const testUrl = 'https://vertem.com/marketplace?token=abc123';
    (useAirlineMiles as jest.Mock).mockReturnValue({
      redirectURL: testUrl,
      isLoading: false,
      isError: false,
      fetchAirlineMilesToken: mockFetchToken,
      reset: mockReset,
    });

    const { getByTestId } = render(
      <TestProvider>
        <AirlineMilesMarketplace {...defaultProps} />
      </TestProvider>
    );

    const webView = getByTestId('webview');
    expect(webView.props.source).toEqual({ uri: testUrl });
  });
});

import { devtools, persist, createJSONStorage } from 'zustand/middleware';
import { immer } from 'zustand/middleware/immer';
import storage from '../../src/redux/store/storage';
import { CardPlaceRootStore, setSlicesCardPlace } from '../../src/newArch/store/slices';

/**
 * ⚠️ Test only store - Do not import into production code ⚠️
 * If you are looking to register a new CardPlace slice for use in superApp,
 * use `setSlicesCardPlace` instead. That function consolidates all slices from
 * this package and is the entry point imported by the superApp.
 */
export const useTestRootStore = create<CardPlaceRootStore>()(
  devtools(
    persist(
      immer((...a) => ({
        ...setSlicesCardPlace(...a),
      })),
      {
        name: 'root-storage',
        storage: createJSONStorage(() => storage),
        partialize: (s) => ({
          parameterPointsProgram: s.parameterPointsProgram,
        }),
        merge: (persisted, current) => ({ ...current, ...(persisted as Partial<CardPlaceRootStore>) }),
      }
    ),
    { name: 'RootStore' }
  )
);

import { Provider } from 'react-redux';
import { DeepPartial } from 'redux';
import configureMockStore from 'redux-mock-store';

import rootReducers from '../../../src/redux/reducers';

export type RootReducers = DeepPartial<typeof rootReducers>;

const ReduxMockProvider: React.FC<{
  initialState?: RootReducers;
  children: React.ReactNode;
}> = ({ children, initialState = {} }) => {
  const mockStore = configureMockStore([]);
  const store = mockStore(initialState);

  return <Provider store={store}>{children}</Provider>;
};

export default ReduxMockProvider;
